title: pavonia multiflora
intro: Pavonia multiflora, also known as Rock Rose or Pavonia, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the mallow family (Malvaceae). This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it a popular remedy for various health issues. The medicinal properties of Pavonia multiflora have been reported to have health benefits such as reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and supporting the immune system. Pavonia multiflora can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, allowing for various herbal preparations to be used for its medicinal purposes.
